untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific indicators not in the allowed list: strike_price (options contract parameter), days_to_expiration (options calendar), time_value_premium (options Greeks). This is an options management rule rather than a price/technical indicator signal. The rule involves allowing assignment on a written call position, which requires options contract data unavailable in the provided indicator set.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_37 is a covered call management strategy from 'The Option Writer' by Lawrence McMillan. It describes accepting assignment (early exercise) when the stock price exceeds the strike price and intrinsic value dominates (time value disappears). This requires options Greeks and contract-level data that cannot be expressed using only the price-based technical indicators provided.
